product_overview: A web-based multi-tenant ISP billing and network management app that lets operators manage customers, sell service packages, track transactions, and administer MikroTik routers from a single dashboard.
core_goals: Allow operators to securely sign in and access a tenant-specific management console
Create, manage and sell service packages (Hotspot/PPPoE) to customers
Onboard and manage customer accounts, including creating and activating services
View system-wide and per-router revenue/usage analytics and recent activity
Log, search and export financial transactions for reconciliation
Manage routers (MikroTik) and run onboarding/setup wizards for each router

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow operators to sign in to the application using their username and password and then access tenant-specific pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill username -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill username with invalid value -> Submit login form -> See validation error for credentials

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Provide an at-a-glance view of revenue, router/connection status, top activity and recent transactions; support filtering to focus on a specific router.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See revenue and router status summary -> View revenue charts -> Filter dashboard by router -> See charts and statistics update to reflect selected router

features.name: Client Management
features.description: List and manage all customer accounts (Hotspot and PPPoE), create new customers, and perform common actions like activate/extend services and export customer lists.
user_flows: Navigate to /clients -> See paginated list of customers and status indicators -> Filter customers by status -> Open add client form -> Fill client details -> Save client -> See new client in list
Navigate to /clients -> Select expired customers filter -> Bulk extend service for selected customers -> See updated expiry dates

features.name: Package Management
features.description: Create and manage service packages (Hotspot, PPPoE, Static IP) with pricing, bandwidth limits and duration so customers can purchase or be assigned plans.
user_flows: Navigate to /packages -> See list of packages with type, bandwidth, price and validity -> Open add package form -> Enter package type and name -> Set price, duration and router -> Configure upload/download speed and hotspot settings -> Save package -> See package listed
Navigate to /packages -> Open an existing package -> Update price or validity -> Save changes -> See updated package details

features.name: All Transactions (Finance Management)
features.description: View and manage payment and transaction records, filter by date/route/transaction type, and export transaction lists for reconciliation.
user_flows: Navigate to /all-transactions -> See paginated transaction list with user, plan, amount, method and status -> Filter transactions by date range or router -> Export filtered transactions

features.name: Router (Mikrotiks) Management
features.description: Register and manage MikroTik routers, run a guided setup wizard that provides configuration scripts and lets operators verify router connections.
user_flows: Navigate to /mikrotiks -> See list of registered routers and their last seen / CPU / remote access status -> Open add router form -> Enter access code and router name -> Select VPN configuration mode -> Create router -> See the new router in list

Navigate to /mikrotiks -> Open router details -> Start router setup wizard -> Download OpenVPN/OVPN setup script -> Import script into the router per instructions -> Return to wizard and check connection -> See router marked as online

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: User login with username and password
